description: Compañía Introductora de Buenos Aires S.A. manufactures and markets table salt, condiments, spices, vinegars, and olive oil for households in Argentina and internationally. The company also offers ready meals, ketchup, soy sauce, liquid dressings, sweet sauces, pastry, sugar, cinnamon powder, baking soda, grated coconut, pastry, flavorings, and salts for industry. The company was founded in 1901 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina. Compañía Introductora de Buenos Aires S.A. is a subsidiary of F V Sociedad Anonima.
